comment: Machine-readable Agent Matrix registry. THE source orchestrators consume programmatically (orchestrate.mjs validates plans against it; `orchestrate agents` prints it). Prose detail lives in the operator dashboard's onboarding contract (Aralia-operator-dashboard/docs/agent-matrix/sections/05-agent-offering-registration-contract.md) — when that changes, update this file. Statuses: ready | quota_limited | trial | deprecated | unknown. A packet agent must have role 'worker', status ready/quota_limited, and dispatch wiring (dispatch.command or type agent-tool) to pass validatePlan.

claude.label: Claude subagent (Agent tool)
claude.notes: Default worker. Dispatched by the orchestrator via the Agent tool with the prompt from `orchestrate prompt <plan> <packet>`; a script cannot spawn Claude subagents.

codex.label: Codex CLI (gpt-5.5)

constraints.note: usage quota resets ~2am — probe before dispatch
reserved for orchestrator/supervisor role — do NOT dispatch as a worker lane

codex.notes: Proven orchestrator workhorse. Honors .gitignore — inline full specs in the prompt, never point it at .agent/scratch paths.

gemini.label: Gemini CLI
gemini.notes: Deprecated for new coding-worker lanes (2026-06); historical sessions preserved for audit only.

agy.label: Google Antigravity CLI
agy.notes: Preferred Google-family lane per policy. Probe 2026-07-02: `agy -p "..."` produced NO output in 90s — auth/quota unverified; stays unwired until a human verifies login.

cursor.label: Cursor CLI

constraints.note: free plan 100% used; use --model auto (Ask-mode) only

cursor.notes: trial-verified per onboarding contract, but no orchestrate.mjs launch spec yet — wire dispatch.command/args before first campaign use.

kilo.label: Kilo CLI (@kilocode/cli)

constraints.note: free model kilo/kilo-auto/free ONLY — no paid/partner routes without operator approval

kilo.notes: VERIFIED 2026-07-02: `kilo run -m kilo/kilo-auto/free "<prompt>"` returned PROBE_OK (exit 0) on the free tier. First non-Claude worker lane.

ollama.label: Ollama local runtime
ollama.notes: A model runtime, not a coding agent — needs an external adapter (Kilo/Aider/OpenCode) to become a worker lane.

amp.label: Amp CLI
amp.notes: Not installed; charges credits — operator approval needed for paid routes.

zcode.label: ZCode native app
zcode.notes: Desktop IDE, not a terminal CLI; Remote Control stream unproven.
